items.question: What services does Healisys Solutions offer?
items.answer: We offer web development, mobile app development, custom software, enterprise applications, UI/UX design, API development, cloud solutions, e-commerce development, software testing, consulting, and more.

items.question: Where is Healisys Solutions based?
items.answer: Healisys Solutions is an India-based IT and software development company serving clients across the country and internationally through remote collaboration.

items.question: How long has Healisys Solutions been in business?
items.answer: Our domain was registered in April 2010, and we have been delivering software development services since our establishment that year.

items.question: How do you start a new project?
items.answer: Every project begins with a discovery call to understand your goals, followed by requirements documentation, technical planning, and a proposed timeline with clear milestones.

items.question: What is your typical project timeline?
items.answer: Timelines vary based on scope. A small web application may take 6-8 weeks, while larger enterprise systems can span several months. We provide estimates after the discovery phase.

items.question: Do you work with startups as well as enterprises?
items.answer: Yes. We work with startups, SMEs, and larger organisations. Our approach scales to match your budget, timeline, and technical requirements.

items.question: Can you take over an existing project?
items.answer: Yes. We regularly assist clients whose projects were started by other teams. We begin with a code and architecture review before proposing next steps.

items.question: Which technologies do you use?
items.answer: We work with React, Next.js, Node.js, .NET, Python, Flutter, React Native, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, AWS, Azure, and other modern tools selected per project needs.

items.question: Do you provide mobile app development for both iOS and Android?
items.answer: Yes. We build native and cross-platform mobile applications for both iOS and Android using technologies like React Native and Flutter.

items.question: Can you integrate with third-party APIs and payment gateways?
items.answer: Absolutely. We integrate payment gateways popular in India such as Razorpay, along with CRMs, ERPs, shipping providers, and other third-party services.

items.question: Do you offer post-launch support?
items.answer: Yes. We provide maintenance and support packages covering bug fixes, security updates, performance monitoring, and feature enhancements.

items.question: How is pricing structured?
items.answer: Pricing depends on project scope, complexity, and engagement model. We offer fixed-price and time-and-materials options after understanding your requirements.

items.question: How do I get a project quote?
items.answer: Contact us at info@healisyssolutions.com with a brief description of your project. We will schedule a call and provide a tailored proposal.

items.question: What communication can I expect during development?
items.answer: We provide regular status updates, sprint demos, and direct access to your project manager. Communication channels include email, video calls, and project management tools.

items.question: How do I apply for a position at Healisys Solutions?
items.answer: Visit our Careers page, browse open positions, and click Apply on the role that interests you. Submit your details and resume through the application form.

items.question: Do you offer remote work opportunities?
items.answer: Yes. Most positions are available as Hybrid or Remote, allowing talented professionals across India to join our team.
